# holistics_data_source (Data Source)

Look up a Holistics data source (database connection) by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "holistics_data_source" "warehouse" {
  id = 5
}

output "warehouse_db_type" {
  value = data.holistics_data_source.warehouse.dbtype
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `dbtype` (String)
- `id` (Number) The ID of this resource.
- `is_default` (Boolean)
- `is_sample` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
- `settings` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--settings))

<a id="nestedatt--settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `settings`

Read-Only:

- `enable_schema_info` (Boolean)
- `query_timeout` (Number)
- `require_ssl` (Boolean)
- `timezone` (String)
- `use_connection_str` (Boolean)
